name: SSL/TLS Certificates Expiring Within 30 Days
description: Identifies SSL/TLS certificates that will expire within the next 30 days
query: SELECT id, domain, issuer, valid_to, days_until_expiry FROM certificates WHERE days_until_expiry <= 30 AND days_until_expiry > 0
remediation: Renew the certificate before expiration. Contact your certificate authority or use automated certificate management (e.g., Let's Encrypt, AWS ACM).
